docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO NANCY HOFFMAN RETURNED -MOVED, NOT FORWARDABLE;
COPY OF JUDGEMNT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF PER WRITTEN REQUEST; PLS.SEE FILE FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOFFMAN, NANCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAEHWILER, CATHY $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,320.00, GAEHWILER, JOHN DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY HOFFMAN, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT GAEHWILER, CATHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-1998 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GAEHWILER, CATHY
PLAINTIFF'S ADDRESS CORRECTION FILED AND COPY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO NEW ADDRESS;
